name: Floating Navbar
description: A sticky navigation bar that floats at the top of the viewport with a glassmorphism effect, smoothly appearing/disappearing on scroll.
whenToUse: Use as the primary navigation bar for any website that needs a modern, floating nav with scroll-aware visibility.

props.name: navItems
props.type: { name: string; link: string; icon?: React.ReactNode }[]
props.description: Array of navigation items to display

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the navbar
